title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: December 1, 2022
summary: December 1, 2022: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase but at a slightly higher rate from last week, of 4.55% , from the level on 11/24/2022 of 10.250 M km 2 to 10.739 M km 2 for this week. title: Planning Commission Meets December 13. Here’s how to weigh in….
summary: The Regular Planning Commission meets December 13, 2022, at 7 P.M. This meeting will be a hybrid meeting held both in person and via Zoom, and will be to review a Conditional Use Permit & City Project Review for BRH’s Emergency Department addition, a Preliminary Plat Approval for a subdivision of one 19.71 acre lot into three lots, a modification to the Delta Drive Subdivision Plat Note 9. title: The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 28 November, 2022
summary: Take Five is The Arctic Institute's weekly redux on the Arctic's most important stories, published every Friday. The post The Arctic This Week Take Five: Week of 28 November, 2022 appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: Shareholder Spotlight: Richard Atuk
summary: Shareholder Richard Atuk was one of BSNC’s first employees. Today, he is involved with Kingikmiut Singers and Dancers of Anchorage and Kissaq Kingikmiurguqtuat dialect language revitalization efforts. “When we start speaking about language, we start speaking about history and culture,” said Atuk. “In the Lower 48, colonization was about taking land. title: Upcoming Adjustments to GVEA Rates Result in Overall Decrease
summary: Factoring in both rate adjustments, beginning January 1, 2023, residential members will see their monthly electric bill decrease by an estimated $19.72, based on average residential usage of 600 kWh per month.
